name: auto-caption-video
description: Transcribe videos, create subtitles, optimize social-video layouts, and render a polished final cut.

interface.longDescription: Automatically transcribe video, generate timed subtitles, trim silence, improve vertical or landscape layouts, and render a finished captioned MP4.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $auto-caption-video to transcribe this video, add readable subtitles, improve its layout, and render the final cut.
